This is apart of the KC giving grove.
https://kccg.my.site.com/Volunteer/s/

The parks department manages the orchard and allows anyone to take the fruit. Orchard includes apples, Asian pears, Euro pears, cherries, jujubes, bush cherries, and blackberries.
